decisions.summary: Python sidecar architecture: brain service (FastAPI) communicates with OpenClaw via HTTP
Embedding model: gemini-embedding-001 at 3072 dimensions (max Matryoshka resolution)
Full brain scope: memory + gut + consolidation + DMN + safety + bootstrap
PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector for all brain storage (replaces LanceDB)
Unified memory: discard L0/L1 layers, identity emerges from Beta weights in unified table. See KB/blueprints/v0.2_unified_memory_rework.md
Two mutation types: access_count+alpha for context injection, last_accessed refresh for gate touch. See DJ-004.
Separated access_count from alpha boost in apply_retrieval_mutation(). Safety can't block counting. See DJ-004.
DMN daydreaming should call touch_memory() on sampled memories to refresh 24h non-decay window. Idle agent forgets everything without this.
Identity injection: injection_score = weight_center * cosine_sim. No floor. All non-immutable memories vector-scored. Zero relevance = zero score. Log all w×s interactions. See DJ-005.

Consolidation research: contradiction → LLM classifies (factual/subjective, confidence>0.7) → spawn agent research session with web search. 1/hour, 24/day max. Highest single weight priority. Skip both<0.3. HIGH confidence to displace. See DJ-007.

No core identity tier. Identity hash dormant (feature-flagged off). System prompt = immutables + w×s scored memories. Core values emerge from behavioral patterns via consolidation insights. See DJ-006.
Adaptive context shift: active identity cached, recomputed when context_shift > P75 of last 200 values. Self-evolving threshold. Bootstrap default 0.5.
Full memory injection, no truncation. Gate enforces max ~300 tokens per memory via semantic chunking at storage time. Token budget limits count, not content.
Memory groups: chunks linked by memory_group_id. Group-wide beta refresh on any member access. Insights from single group share group_id. Agent sees group metadata. No merging.
w×s interaction logging: injection_logs DB table + 3-tier analysis (real-time metrics, daily batch+behavioral classification, weekly anomaly detection). Full context logged for formula evaluation.

Proactive notifications: urgency (time-sensitive, push NOW) ≠ importance (content significance, btw next chat) ≠ weight. notification_outbox + delivery worker + Telegram/WhatsApp/webhook channels. Quiet hours.
AGENTS.md web search rule: brain memory trusted, LLM training data NOT trusted. Agent must verify training-data facts via web search. Rate limit 3 searches/turn.

Pattern detection: 1/day, HDBSCAN cluster embeddings, per-cluster LLM analysis, cross-cluster summary. 1-level recursion (insights→meta-insights, meta excluded from future). No cap. Dedup sim>0.85. Insight weights = weighted average by center of sources.
Decay tick interval 5min→1h. 12x reduction in idle decay pressure. Prevents death spiral without conversation.
Consolidation dedup+reinforce. All 4 creation paths check novelty at sim>=0.85. Not novel → reinforce existing via apply_retrieval_mutation. Prevents duplicate memory flood.
DMN cold-start fallback. When all 4 sampling channels return None, weight-proportional random sampling from all memories. Floor 0.01 on weights.
Insight weight inheritance. store_insight computes weighted-avg alpha/beta from sources (center-weighted). No source importance demotion — sources keep weight until insight proves itself.

GATE WIRING: POST /memory/gate passes top-N memory embeddings to ExitGate.evaluate()
No L0/L1 JSON files — identity is the weights
GET /identity renders from top memories, not JSON files

Verify /memory/gate exit gate classifies relevance from top-N memory embeddings

tasks.title: DMN / Idle Loop: spontaneous self-prompts + rumination

tasks.title: Safety Monitor: ceilings + rate limiters + circuit breakers

Diminishing returns on reinforcement

tasks.title: Identity w×s scoring + hash feature flag
tasks.intent: Replace pure weight-rank identity selection with weight_center × cosine_sim scoring. Feature-flag identity hash to dormant. Corresponds to plan Phase 1.
tasks.deliverable: context_assembly.py: _get_top_identity_memories uses w×s instead of weight-rank. Identity hash behind ENABLE_IDENTITY_HASH env var (default false). api.py: identity endpoint respects flag.
acceptance_criteria: Identity memories scored by weight_center * cosine_sim(memory_emb, query_emb)
Zero-relevance memories never injected regardless of weight
Identity hash section not rendered when flag is off
GET /identity still works when flag is on
No regression in /context/assemble response format
verification: Store diverse memories, call /context/assemble with specific query — only relevant high-weight memories injected
Verify identity_hash empty in assembled context when flag off

tasks.title: Injection logging + w×s analytics
tasks.intent: Add injection_logs table to record every identity injection decision. Add metrics endpoint. Infrastructure for empirically validating the w×s formula. Corresponds to plan Phase 2.
tasks.deliverable: schema.sql: injection_logs table. context_assembly.py: log every injection decision. api.py: GET /injection/metrics endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: injection_logs table stores: memory_id, agent_id, weight_center, cosine_sim, injection_score, was_injected, query_hash, created_at
Every /context/assemble call logs injection decisions
GET /injection/metrics returns rolling stats (avg/p50/p75/p95 scores, injection rate, top memories)
Logging is non-blocking (try/except wrapped)
verification: Call /context/assemble 10x, query injection_logs — all decisions logged
Call /injection/metrics — stats populated

tasks.title: Semantic chunking + memory groups
tasks.intent: Enforce 300-token max at gate time via semantic chunking. Link chunks by memory_group_id. Group-wide beta refresh. Corresponds to plan Phase 3.
tasks.deliverable: schema.sql: memory_group_id column + index. gate.py: semantic chunking at storage. memory.py: group-wide touch. consolidation.py: insights inherit group_id.
acceptance_criteria: Gate rejects memories > 300 tokens, chunks them semantically
Chunks share memory_group_id
touch_memory on one chunk refreshes last_accessed on all group members
store_insight assigns group_id when all sources share one
Existing memories unaffected (group_id NULL = standalone)
verification: Store long content via gate — verify chunked into multiple memories with shared group_id
Touch one chunk — verify all siblings refreshed

tasks.title: Adaptive context shift threshold
tasks.intent: Replace hardcoded 0.7 context shift threshold with P75 of last 200 shift values. Self-evolving. Corresponds to plan Phase 4.
tasks.deliverable: context_assembly.py: ring buffer of last 200 context_shift values, P75 threshold computation, active identity caching between shifts.
acceptance_criteria: Context shift threshold computed from P75 of last 200 values
Ring buffer persists across restarts (DB or file)
Bootstrap default 0.5 when < 200 values collected
Active identity cached and reused when shift < threshold
Identity recomputed when shift >= threshold
verification: Call /context/assemble 200+ times with varying queries — verify threshold adapts
Restart brain — verify ring buffer preserved

tasks.title: Fix critical bugs: unsafe dir() + N+1 retrieval mutation
tasks.intent: Fix CQ-001 (dir() check), CQ-002 (40 SQL/retrieval), CQ-003 (N+1 near-miss), CQ-004 (N+1 co-access). Highest-priority bugfixes from Session 20 audit.
tasks.deliverable: memory.py: replace dir() with explicit None check. Batch access_count + alpha updates into single UPDATE WHERE id = ANY($1). Batch near-miss beta into single UPDATE WHERE id = ANY($1) AND NOT immutable. relevance.py: batch co-access UPSERT with executemany or UNNEST.
acceptance_criteria: No dir() in codebase
apply_retrieval_mutation uses ≤5 SQL statements regardless of top_k/near_miss count
Safety checks still applied per-memory where needed
verification: grep -r 'dir()' brain/src — no hits
Add query logging, call /memory/retrieve — count SQL statements

tasks.title: Fix safety bypass in promotion + decay
tasks.intent: Fix CQ-005 (promotion alpha+=5.0 bypasses safety) and CQ-006 (decay beta+=1.0 bypasses entropy). Route large weight changes through SafetyMonitor.
tasks.deliverable: consolidation.py: _promote_patterns routes alpha boosts through safety.check_weight_change(). _decay_and_reconsolidate checks entropy monitor for large beta changes.
acceptance_criteria: Promotion alpha boosts checked by HardCeiling + DiminishingReturns
No memory can exceed 0.95 center via promotion
Deep decay (beta+=1.0) checked by entropy monitor
Constant decay tick (beta+=0.01) exempt (too small to matter)
verification: Set memory alpha high, trigger promotion — verify ceiling enforced
Check safety audit log shows promotion events

tasks.title: Fix unreachable bootstrap milestones 5/7/8

tasks.deliverable: Milestone checks revised to match actual system behavior: M5 checks dmn_log, M7 checks type=tension, M8 checks type=narrative.

tasks.deliverable: memory.py: embed_batch uses Gemini batch API (single call for multiple texts). gate.py: contradiction check reuses most_similar_id from check_novelty instead of re-searching.
acceptance_criteria: embed_batch sends 1 API call per 100 texts (not 100 calls)

verification: Add request logging to embed, trigger consolidation — verify batch call count

tasks.title: Proactive notification system
tasks.intent: Allow agent to contact user outside conversation when research or DMN produces urgent/important results. Urgency (time-sensitive) triggers push notification. Importance (content significance) triggers passive mention next conversation. Neither depends on memory weight.
tasks.deliverable: notification_outbox DB table, importance/urgency scoring (weight + semantic + temporal), delivery worker (async, Telegram first), user notification preferences (channels, quiet hours, thresholds), passive injection for non-push notifications
acceptance_criteria: notification_outbox table created with urgency/importance scoring
Delivery worker sends Telegram messages for urgent items
Passive notifications injected into cognitive state for important non-urgent items
Quiet hours respected
User can configure channels and thresholds
verification: Create urgent notification, verify Telegram delivery
Create important notification, verify appears in next conversation context
Set quiet hours, verify delivery delayed

files_changed: brain/src/llm.py — removed max_output_tokens, thinking model runs unrestricted (BUG-001)

brain/src/consolidation.py — D-022: DECAY_TICK_INTERVAL 300->3600. D-023: all 4 creation paths (tensions, insights, narratives, revalidation) check_novelty at 0.85, reinforce existing via apply_retrieval_mutation instead of creating new
brain/src/memory.py — D-025: store_memory accepts initial_alpha/initial_beta. store_insight computes weighted-avg alpha/beta from sources (center-weighted). Removed source importance demotion.
brain/src/idle.py — D-024: _sample_fallback added. When all 4 channels return None, picks from ALL memories with probability proportional to weight center (floor 0.01).
db_cleanup_plan: Step 1: Identify keeper memories — for each duplicate cluster (sim>=0.95), keep the one with highest center (or highest access_count if tied)
Step 2: Delete non-keeper duplicates — DELETE FROM memories WHERE id IN (non-keeper-ids) AND agent_id='default'
Step 3: Clean orphaned supersedes links — DELETE FROM memory_supersedes WHERE source_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM memories) OR insight_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM memories)
Step 4: Verify — SELECT count(*), type, avg(length(content)) FROM memories WHERE agent_id='default' GROUP BY type
Step 5: Restart brain — docker compose up -d brain

root_causes_fixed.BUG-001: gemini-3-flash-preview thinking model consumed max_output_tokens budget with internal chain-of-thought. max_tokens=200 left ~20 tokens for actual output. Fix: removed max_output_tokens entirely.
root_causes_fixed.decay_spiral: D-022 reduces decay from 0.12 beta/hr to 0.01 beta/hr. No conversation needed to survive.
root_causes_fixed.duplicate_flood: D-023 checks novelty on ALL creation paths. 49% of pool were near-exact duplicates (sim>=0.95). Now reinforces existing instead of creating new.
root_causes_fixed.dmn_dead: D-024 bypasses unreachable channel thresholds (>0.5/>0.6 center when max is 0.24). Fallback samples any memory weighted by center.
root_causes_fixed.source_demotion: D-025 removes importance cap on source memories. Insights inherit source weights instead of starting at fixed 1.0/4.0.
